title: polypodiodes bourretii
intro: Polypodiodes bourretii, also known as Bourret's fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Polypodiodes bourretii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
